title: YENİ YAYIN!
content:
YENİ YAYIN!

‘’ A Review of Theses with Randomised Controlled Experimental Designs on Kangaroo Care (Skin-to-Skin Contact) in Nursing and Midwifery in Türkiye: A Retrospective Study’’ başlıklı çalışma ‘’ Istanbul Esenyurt University Journal of Health Sciences’’dergisinde yayımlandı.
